title: JP Spares: From Humble Beginnings to the Best Automotive Parts & Accessories
description: BEST OF GEORGE WINNER - JP Spares started in...
bodyText:
BEST OF GEORGE WINNER - JP Spares started in 1988 as a small one-man business. From these humble beginnings, we continued to grow into our current 1600m2 shop, with 38 dedicated people on our team.

Since our early days we have followed the age-old concept of “the customer is king.”


> We strive to fulfill our customer’s needs, to let them feel satisfied and well looked after. This way, many of our customers have become friends and continues to come back regularly.


Our second motto is “Never say no”. If we do not have a product in stock, we will source it for you. We have more than 100 years of combined sales experience among our senior staff – we know where to find the impossible!

We believe in a circle of continuity – starting with the customer and his needs, cared for by our hand-picked team of personnel, and delivering products of high quality. This ensures that our clients continue to return when they need something else.

We are currently busy expanding and renovating our premises into a massive one-stop-shop to offer an even better shopping experience and variety of goods for the whole family. Think a children’s corner with automotive-related toys, camping and braai equipment, workshop, and household tools, a specialised range of clothing, and headgear – the list is growing as we introduce new ideas every day.

We want to say: thank you from our hearts to the people of George who voted for us. You are our customers; we feel proud to offer our services to you and will continue to do our best to deliver what you need.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
